internal_unresolveds.reason: Principal mark 'Tempo' not federally registered; applications pending since Dec 2019 (5+ years)
HOA Hotels LLC license of 'The Tempo' mark to HIH is on 1-year auto-renewal — could be contested
Three antitrust class actions pending re: IDeaS/Amadeus/STR revenue management data sharing — potential systemic impact on GRO system
Graduate brand acquisition ($85.3M) recorded in 2024 — implications for balance sheet and portfolio management
$261.9M 'Due from Hilton affiliates' equity reduction — amounts not expected to be repaid
OnQ costs in Item 5 ($102,817-$209,352) differ from Item 7 ($107,912-$214,447) — Item 7 includes third-party costs
Item 7 Note 22 says no actual Tempo data but table provides detailed estimates — estimates based on Hilton experience, not Tempo actuals
Restricted Area historically extended for full term but franchisor states future intent to not do so — deliberate policy change
